categoryDefinitions.$description: These categories are applied to nodes in the ROS1 Bridge
categoryDefinitions.isaacRobotEngineBridge: Nodes implementing functionality for Isaac SDK Interoperability
categoryDefinitions.isaacRobotEngineBridge:publisher: Nodes that publish a Isaac SDK  message
categoryDefinitions.isaacRobotEngineBridge:subscriber: Nodes that subscribe to a Isaac SDK  message
